prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: D&D 5e / Forgotten Realms inspired heroic high fantasy world map for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant magical continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago, frontier towns and hamlets, coastal harbors, ancient forests, jagged mountains, winding rivers, dungeon entrances, ruined keeps, wizard towers, dragon-haunted islands, sacred groves, pirate coves, volcanic isles and enchanted sea routes.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated fantasy atlas, parchment cartography, inked relief terrain, hand-painted biomes, glowing runes, classic heroic adventure map atmosphere.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map; main continent sits off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping along the coast in a diagonal arc; islands range from tiny islets and reef belts to large island realms and crescent island chains; include compass rose, decorative border, roads, sea routes, dungeon icons and subtle borders without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed and varied in size and shape, with channels, lagoons, reefs, volcanic islands, atolls and broken shores; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, capes, marshes and fragmented cliffs; show deserts, forests, plains, snowy peaks, jungles, wetlands, magical wastelands and volcanic regions.
Avoid: uniform island grid, simple round islands, tropical-only mood, modern satellite image, board-game UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
